name: @pond-ts/financial
description: Financial-market domain library on pond-ts — trading calendars, session-aligned bar building, and market analytics

scripts.prepack: cp ../../LICENSE ./LICENSE && cp ../../CHANGELOG.md ./CHANGELOG.md && npm run build && cp cjs-fallback.cjs dist/cjs-fallback.cjs && find dist -name '*.map' -delete
scripts.test: npm run test:type && npm run test:runtime
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run build && npm test
